request: Two related fixes in one cycle: (1) Reporter bug — claude-automation-recommender/SKILL.md:45 recommends `vitest run --reporter=basic`, but `basic` was removed as a vitest reporter in v4.x, so every /init-project'd vitest repo gets a test.cmd that errors at startup. Change to `--reporter=dot`. (2) Docs-only verify trap — the chore track makes `verify` mandatory but its PASS rule assumes test.cmd is a whole-repo sanity check; when a repo wires test.cmd to a narrow behavior suite, any pure-docs chore can never pass verify and dead-ends. Make verify conditional in the chore track the way integrate already is — excepted when the write_set is pure-docs AND test.cmd is a behavior suite (not a structural check); /triage records the exception. Amends docs/init/seed.md → CLAUDE.md → chore SKILL + triage logic.
